description: Starter kit template library seed manifest

workflows.name: Template - Local Ollama Chat
workflows.notes: LangChain chat UI backed by local Ollama. Requires Ollama reachable and model pulled (e.g. llama3.2:3b).

workflows.name: Template - Supabase API Health Check
workflows.notes: Webhook calls Kong auth health from inside the Docker network. No stored Supabase credentials required.

workflows.name: Template - NodeBot Builder
workflows.notes: Chat Hub workflow agent backed by Ollama and the n8n instance-level MCP server. Requires MCP enabled and an MCP access token.

workflows.name: SK - Create Greeting Workflow
workflows.notes: Sub-workflow used by NodeBot Builder Call n8n Workflow Tool for reliable Manual Trigger + Set hello demos.

workflows.name: SK - Create Webhook Workflow
workflows.notes: NodeBot Builder helper: creates a POST webhook with a Set node that normalizes/echoes the payload.

workflows.name: SK - Create Scheduled Workflow
workflows.notes: NodeBot Builder helper: creates a Schedule Trigger + Set workflow from a 5-field cron expression.

workflows.name: SK - List Workflows
workflows.notes: NodeBot Builder helper: wraps MCP search_workflows so the chat agent can list/describe workflows in one tool call.

credentialSetup.name: Local Ollama API
credentialSetup.setup: Create in n8n UI if not imported: base URL http://ollama:11434 (container) or http://host.docker.internal:11434 (host Ollama).

credentialSetup.name: n8n MCP Access Token
credentialSetup.setup: scripts/setup.sh generates the token from the first n8n owner account and updates this credential automatically. If no owner exists yet, create the first n8n account and re-run npm run setup.
